basic_details.short_information: Rail Vikas Nigam (RVNL) Project Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of RVNL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RVNL Project Manager Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RVNL Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. The interview is scheduled for 12th June 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Civil Engineering to be eligible for the Project Manager position at Rail Vikas Nigam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Manager post is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Manager post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this RVNL recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Manager position is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Project Manager post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for the Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Manager position is negotiable, as mentioned in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).
